mapper.insert: INSERT INTO dx_content (extract_code, content_type, object_name, status, expire_at) VALUES (#{extractCode}, #{contentType}, #{objectName}, #{status}, #{expireAt})
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1) FROM dx_content WHERE extract_code = #{extractCode} AND status = 'Y' AND expire_at > NOW()
mapper.update: UPDATE dx_content SET status = 'N' WHERE expire_at < NOW() AND status = 'Y'
UPDATE dx_content SET status = 'N' WHERE content_id = #{contentId}
